fullArticle:
Samuel Basallo hits 2-run homer to back Trevor Rogers as Orioles blank Reds 3-0

Trevor Rogers has played 7 seasons for the Marlins and Orioles. He has 30 wins, 44 losses, an ERA of 3.92 and 590 strikeouts.
